steps.title: Use the yielded contrast
steps.content: The conjecture seemed one way to mathematicians, but it eventually yielded to a proof. The contrast calls for a word meaning seemingly impossible to overcome.

steps.title: Pick the obstacle word
steps.content: A means clear and unambiguous. B means unavoidable or inevitable. C means beyond criticism. The remaining word means insurmountable, matching a problem that seemed impossible but was later solved. The answer is D.
